evals.prompt: Run validation checks on the codebase - build, tests, and lint
evals.expected_output: Validation results for build, tests, and lint with pass/fail status and any error details

evals.prompt: Validate the implementation against the ticket at .planning/tickets/user-authentication.md - verify all acceptance criteria are met
evals.expected_output: Verification report showing which acceptance criteria are met and which are not

evals.prompt: Run a code review on the recent changes - check for security issues, best practices, and code quality
evals.expected_output: Code review findings with specific issues and recommendations
